display.purpose: Hero name only — once per page.

shadows.name: interactive-glow
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus halo on interactive cards and CTAs. Never a resting state.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default exit/entrance easing — exponential ease-out, no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Terminal-style CTA with a leading accent glyph; border and glow appear on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #10121a; color: #e8eaf2; border: 1px solid #232738; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9375rem; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary .ds-caret { color: #4d7cff; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { border-color: #4d7cff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #4d7cff, 0 0 32px #4d7cff26; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4d7cff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Mission Card
components.description: Project card led by a mono status header, status dot, title, cyan metrics, and bracketed footer actions.
components.html:
MISSION-01 · DEPLOYED live

Tata Steel Vision

YOLOv10 people-counting deployed on the plant floor.

── python · yolov10 · opencv ──

  • ▸ 98.2% precision
[ case study ] [ github ]
components.css: .ds-mission { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #10121a; border: 1px solid #232738; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; color: #e8eaf2; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-mission:hover { background: #161927; border-color: #4d7cff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #4d7cff, 0 0 32px #4d7cff26; } .ds-mission-h { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7d83a0; } .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; text-transform: none; } .ds-status i { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #41e2d8; display: inline-block; } .ds-mission-t { margin: 16px 0 4px; font-family: 'Clash Display', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-mission-s { color: #98a0b8; } .ds-mission-stack, .ds-mission-m { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #7d83a0; margin-top: 16px; } .ds-metric { color: #41e2d8; } .ds-mission-f { margin-top: 24px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; } .ds-link { color: #4d7cff; } .ds-link-dim { color: #7d83a0; }

components.name: Nav Bar
components.description: Fixed translucent top bar with mono logo/breadcrumb, route links, and a ⌘K palette button.
components.html:
anshu.os ▸ ~/work
/work/lab/log
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; background: rgba(5,5,7,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(35,39,56,0.6); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; } .ds-brand { color: #e8eaf2; text-decoration: none; } .ds-crumb { color: #7d83a0; } .ds-navlinks { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-navlinks a { color: #98a0b8; text-decoration: none; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 4px; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-navlinks a:hover { color: #e8eaf2; background: #10121a; } .ds-navlinks a.ds-active { color: #4d7cff; } .ds-cmdk { margin-left: 12px; background: transparent; color: #7d83a0; border: 1px solid #232738; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-cmdk:hover { color: #4d7cff; border-color: #4d7cff; }

narrative.northStar: A developer's real home, presented as a working operating system.
narrative.overview: ANSHU.OS is a personal portfolio that takes one metaphor seriously: the site is a system built by the engineer, not a brochure about him. The metaphor is grounded, never theatrical — it earns its place by being functional (the ⌘K terminal genuinely navigates) rather than decorative. The personality is precise, engineered, understated-confident — the voice of well-architected software read by a skimming recruiter. Confidence is shown through restraint and craft, never volume. It explicitly rejects the generic AI/SaaS look: no decorative gradients, no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no neon glow smeared everywhere. The single biggest failure mode to police is 'black page + one neon accent.' Restraint is the flex.
keyCharacteristics: Layered dark surfaces with a subtle blue-shift (depth, not flat black).
Monospace as the system voice — labels, paths, metrics, terminal, timestamps.
Strict accent discipline: blue = interactive, purple = AI/lab only, cyan = data only.
Sharp, minimal radii and hairline borders; color and glow appear on interaction, not at rest.
At most three loud moments (boot, constellation, terminal); everything else stays quiet.

rules.name: The One Color Per Job Rule
rules.body: Each accent owns exactly one meaning. Signal = interactive, Pulse = AI, Trace = data. Using cyan on a link or purple outside the lab breaks the information system and is forbidden.

rules.name: The Two-Gradient Rule
rules.body: Gradients exist in exactly two places site-wide: the 1px signal→pulse border on the featured mission card, and the boot-screen scanline. Nowhere else, and never as text fill.

rules.name: The System Voice Rule
rules.body: Monospace is reserved for system-register text: paths, labels, metrics, terminal, timestamps, code. Never body prose or headings.

rules.name: The Display-Once Rule
rules.body: The full-size display face appears once per page (the hero). Everywhere else steps down.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; depth comes from the tonal ramp and hairlines. Glow is a response to state, never a default coat.

dos: Do keep accent discipline absolute: signal = interactive, pulse = AI/lab only, trace = data only.
Do convey depth through the tonal surface ramp and 1px hairlines, not drop shadows.
Do keep glow as a hover/focus response only — flat at rest.
Do keep monospace for system-register text and never for body prose.
Do verify ink-dim/ink-faint hit AA (≥4.5:1) on whatever surface they sit on.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion fallback and never gate content behind a motion-triggered reveal.
Do keep the loud moments to three: boot, constellation, terminal.
donts: Don't ship the generic AI/SaaS template look. If a viewer could think 'AI made this,' it has failed.
Don't use purple-to-blue decorative gradients, gradient text, or glassmorphism-as-default.
Don't build identical icon+heading+text card grids or the hero-metric template.
Don't fall into 'black page + one neon accent.'
Don't use Inter or Space Grotesk.
Don't smear neon glow on resting elements or add side-stripe borders.
Don't let the OS metaphor become a costume — if a flourish is purely decorative, cut it.
